scope: app_folder_structure plugin workspace and app-workspace contract engine
source: user-provided app-folder structure brief, canonical full-set correction, and implemented workspace contract
purpose: Preserved Evo history for the Plugin Development Track; the plugin package, canonical folder set, and workspace contract are already implemented in the workspace.
intended_contract: Create and validate app workspaces under workspaces/apps/<app_slug>/
Keep app workspaces governed by a fixed canonical pipeline
Integrate category-approved roadmap structure through app_category_registry
Write manifests, evidence, validation, and repair records safely
Refuse unsafe slugs, unsafe paths, and missing category profiles
Preserve old compact folders only where legacy workspaces already exist

evolutions.title: Repo analysis and scope lock
evolutions.dependency_notes: First slice. Confirm repository patterns before coding.
evolutions.exit_criterion: The boundary is explicit and preserved.

evolutions.title: Plugin skeleton and status surface
evolutions.exit_criterion: app_folder_structure loads and reports status safely.

evolutions.title: Workspace type registry
evolutions.exit_criterion: Workspace types are listed and invalid types are rejected.

evolutions.title: Fixed app pipeline skeleton
evolutions.exit_criterion: A new app workspace is created with the canonical top-level pipeline.

evolutions.title: Viber input area
evolutions.exit_criterion: Viber inputs are separated from generated outputs.

evolutions.title: Category registry integration
evolutions.exit_criterion: Category-specific profile lookup is explicit and fail-closed.

evolutions.title: Category-governed roadmap folders
evolutions.exit_criterion: Only approved roadmap sections are materialized.

evolutions.title: Full specification contract
evolutions.exit_criterion: Specification folders exist and are traceable.

evolutions.title: Evolutions and task punches
evolutions.exit_criterion: The workspace supports clear evolution and punch flow.

evolutions.title: Production governance folders
evolutions.exit_criterion: The governance pipeline exists from agents to archive.

evolutions.title: Commands, validation, repair, and hardening
evolutions.exit_criterion: Workspace creation/validation/repair is safe and test-covered.

evolutions.title: Full canonical folder set upgrade
deliverables: backward compatibility for older compact folders
evolutions.exit_criterion: Existing compact folders are preserved and the full set is present.

evolutions.title: Lifecycle, audit, final acceptance
evolutions.exit_criterion: The plugin is documented, audited, and ready for extension.
